title: Questions from Quarantine: Vaccines and the Public Health Response
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who address public questions submitted via social media with the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The series, titled 'Questions from Quarantine: Vaccines and the Public Health Response,' aims to provide guidance on maintaining mental and physical well-being during the global health crisis. It focuses on public health measures, vaccine-related information, and strategies for coping with the pandemic's challenges. The initiative encourages public engagement and seeks to disseminate expert advice on health security and crisis management directly to a concerned audience.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目每周推出一档网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，节目名为“隔离期的问题：疫苗与公共卫生应对”。该系列旨在回答公众通过社交媒体使用#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提交的疑问，就如何在全球健康危机中保持身心健康提供建议。节目内容聚焦公共卫生措施、疫苗相关信息以及应对疫情挑战的策略。该项目鼓励公众参与，致力于向关注此议题的受众传播有关健康安全和危机管理的专家意见。
